task_completion.description: Verify that a new item of type 'Statute' has been created in the Juris-M library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Juris-M interface, an item should be selected in the middle pane, and the right-hand Info pane should display 'Item Type: Statute'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Name of Act' field is correctly filled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand Info pane, the 'Name of Act' field should contain exactly 'Civil Rights Act of 1964'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Code' and 'Code Number' fields are correctly filled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand Info pane, the 'Code' field should contain 'U.S.C.' and the 'Code Number' field should contain '42'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Section' and 'Date Enacted' fields are correctly filled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand Info pane, the 'Section' field should contain '2000e' and the 'Date Enacted' field should contain '1964-07-02'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Public Law Number' and 'Session' fields are correctly filled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand Info pane, the 'Public Law Number' field should contain '88-352' and the 'Session' field should contain '2d'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'History' field is correctly filled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand Info pane, the 'History' field should contain '78 Stat. 241'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Juris-M graphical user interface to create the item.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the Juris-M application window open and being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or scripts being used to inject the data.

integrity.description: Ensure the data was entered into Juris-M and not a text editor or generic notes app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface visible in the screenshots must be Juris-M (or Zotero, as Juris-M is a fork), recognizable by its three-pane layout (collections, items list, item info).

integrity.description: Ensure the metadata was entered into the specific designated fields, not just pasted as a single block of text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The right-hand Info pane should show the values entered into their respective individual text boxes (e.g., 'Code', 'Section'), rather than all pasted into the 'Abstract' or 'Extra' field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a Statute item with the following verified metadata: Name of Act: 'Civil Rights Act of 1964'; Code: 'U.S.C.'; Code Number: '42'; Section: '2000e'; Date Enacted: '1964-07-02'; Public Law Number: '88-352'; Session: '2d'; History: '78 Stat. 241'.
